name: Murim Survival
short_description: Murim Survival is a survival roguelite where you battle relentless enemies within a time limit. Explore a world on the brink of collapse, master martial arts, collect powerful equipment, and unlock unique traits to become a true hero of the Murim. The fate of this world is in your hands.
detailed_description:
Survive Till the End

Murim Survival, inspired by Vampire Survivors and Diablo, is a roguelite RPG that

emphasizes gear farming and character progression. In a martial world on

the brink of collapse, you must fight relentless monsters and survive against all odds.

Endure waves of enemies for 15 to 20 minutes, then face a powerful final foe

in a fierce battle for survival.

Become the Master of Murim

Even if you fall in battle, don’t be discouraged. Venture into new areas to obtain various

items and martial arts techniques, and grow stronger by interacting with NPCs at your

hideout. Some of them may even become your allies. Additionally, you can improve your

martial arts proficiency through repeated use. With each run, you’ll grow stronger and

push further in your next run.

Unravel the Secrets of a Dying World

The current Murim, established by the legendary master Mujin, flourished

for 500 years before beginning its descent into ruin. All Righteous Sects have been

wiped out, and the land is now overrun by monsters and bandits. To make matters

worse, a contagious disease called Madness has spread, plunging the Murim into chaos.

In this turbulent world, the protagonist, Soun, embarks on a perilous journey to find

a cure for his Madness. Along the way, he will face countless trials, uncover hidden

truths, and grow into a true hero. The fate of the Murim lies in your hands.

Key Features

  • Fast-paced, casual runs lasting 15–20 minutes

  • A pixel-art martial world brought to life with rich detail

  • Challenging bosses, each with unique mechanics and attack patterns

  • Diverse build possibilities, combining active & passive skills, gear, and traits

  • Martial Arts Mastery—train your skills to grow stronger

  • Acquire gear that remains permanent after obtaining.

  • Interact with NPCs and complete quests to enhance your hero

  • Recruit companions by fulfilling special quests

  • Ascension Difficulty, unlocked after clearing normal difficulty,

    for those seeking the ultimate challenge

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
